revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-4-200

A relay the contacts of which are opened or closed through a layer of mercury in order to reduce or prevent contact bounce and electrical noise.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Mercury wetted relay}}
